description.value:
The Adeptus Arbites enforce the Lex Imperialis across the Imperium. Enforcers are well-equipped, well-trained, and fanatically devoted to upholding Imperial Law. They answer to no local authority.

Tactics: Enforcers operate in pairs or fire teams of 4-6. They use shock-and-awe tactics, breaching doors with shotguns and subduing suspects with shock mauls. They prioritise capture over killing when enforcing warrants, but will use lethal force without hesitation against armed resistance.
